title: PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW BEAVERTON PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Parent-Child Interactive Therapy (PCIT) program provides mental health assessment and treatment to children (2-7) and their families. The program involves weekly sessions and in-home practice. 10700 SW Beaverton-Hillside Highway Suite 110 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Ages 2-7 and their families Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-6pm Email (503) 641-1475 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 641-1475 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals or offer free or discounted services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 48 on Cornell Road Services: Parent Child Interactive Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PROMOTORA MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SEVERE MENTAL ILLNESS SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TRANSITION-AGE YOUTH SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW BEAVERTON
